artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download) + importModelJSON (validation + XSS sanitization)

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with error handling and notifications

artifacts.name: Notification
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing success/error notification overlay with a11y support

artifacts.name: gridRules
artifacts.description: snapCoord, getOccupiedCells, isCellOccupied — grid snapping and occupancy logic

artifacts.name: useBrickStore
artifacts.description: Zustand store with all brick actions (place, delete, rotate, setBricks, setNotification)

summary.work_completed: Implemented TDD green phase for FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) and all dependent features. All 15 unit tests passing. PR #35 opened for frontend-review-agent.
key_findings: exportService.ts was already scaffolded on main — verified complete and correct
ActionBar.tsx fully implements Save/Load/Export/Import with proper error handling
gridRules.ts correctly handles rotation swap for 90/270 degree multi-cell footprints
useBrickStore.ts implements all required actions with correct TDD behavior
All 15 unit tests pass: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through 04, store tests, grid tests, color tests

recommended_actions: Verify all test IDs T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through T-FE-SHARE-001-04 are covered
Check XSS sanitization in importModelJSON (type/colorId/rotation allowlists)
Verify ActionBar has correct data-testid attributes: btn-save, btn-load, btn-export, btn-import
Check accessibility: aria-labels on all buttons, role=status on Notification
